title: zanthoxylum mezoneurispinosum
intro: Zanthoxylum mezoneurispinosum, also known as the Taiwanese prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is native to Taiwan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Zanthoxylum mezoneurispinosum is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
